audits.dominantPattern: fragment pivots and negated reassessment beats
clusterWarnings: Scene 3's retrospective memory beat stacks back-to-back negated reassessment fragments.

findings.line: The room was empty. Not stripped, not wholly.
findings.reason: The affirmative sentence and the inventory that follows already carry the information; the negated fragment is scaffolding.

findings.line: Not honest surprise. Or not only that.
findings.reason: The pair defines Sylvanas's reassessment by rejecting labels instead of stating the revised read directly.

audits.dominantPattern: roads and abstractions carrying movement or logistical agency
clusterFlags: Scene 1 route-analysis stretch (lines 35-73) carries three separate road/route smears.

findings.line: The numbers showed the same mark feeding the sickest towns, and the same trouble kept moving south on wagon routes, farther than any one village could see.
findings.subject: trouble
findings.realAgent: contaminated grain shipments traveling south on the wagon routes
findings.reason: The sentence makes an abstraction travel on the routes instead of naming the contaminated grain doing the movement.
findings.suggestedFix: The numbers showed the same mark feeding the sickest towns, and the same contaminated grain kept moving south on wagon routes, farther than any one village could see.

findings.line: South and west instead, into the heavy grain roads that fed the kingdom's interior, the ones laid in her grandmother's day to drag harvest out of the Andorhal basin.
findings.subject: roads
findings.realAgent: grain carts and grain traffic moving inward along those roads
findings.reason: The prose gives the roads the work of provisioning the interior instead of naming the traffic using them.
findings.suggestedFix: South and west instead, into the heavy grain roads used to drag harvest out of the Andorhal basin and deeper into the kingdom's interior.

findings.line: Four days more and they would be deep in the basin, where every road thickened.
findings.subject: road
findings.realAgent: the road network growing denser in the basin
findings.reason: The sentence makes the road itself change substance instead of naming the denser network Sylvanas is tracking.
findings.suggestedFix: Four days more and they would be deep in the basin, where the roads lay closer together.

findings.line: South of Millbrook Spur the King's Road thickened into the main grain road, the one that fed straight into Andorhal and then branched to half the kingdom.
findings.subject: King's Road / grain road
findings.realAgent: the widening route and the grain traffic running into Andorhal before splitting outward
findings.reason: The road is again given the logistics work that belongs to its traffic pattern, and this repeats the chapter's road-agency habit.
findings.suggestedFix: South of Millbrook Spur the King's Road widened into the main grain road, the one that ran straight into Andorhal before branching toward half the kingdom.

audits.dominantPattern: all checked tic families stayed at or below cap
audits.cleanReason: Reviewed every listed tic family plus the pass-A tool-signaled lines. 'Marked' appears exactly twice and both uses are physical; eye/gaze appears once as a tactical scan; the heavy/weight hits are literal descriptors rather than gravity metaphors; no corner-of-mouth, tightened/eased, expression-shift, or creative-tag overages appear.

summary.verdictReason: Fail: four moderate intent-smear kills remain, plus two mild negation pivots. Analytic hints also show structural rhythm concerns and a below-target texture profile.

notes: structural rhythm concerns: comma_period_ratio below calibrated range
structural rhythm concerns: one_sentence_paragraph_pct far above calibrated range

textureMetrics.interpretation: PARTICIPIAL PHRASES: 2.1% (floor: 5.0%, human: 11.0%). Add ', Ving' phrases to connect actions: ', turning back to the fire' / ', gripping the railing with both hands'. These create connective tissue between actions. | COMPOUND CLAUSES: 3.7% (floor: 4.0%, human: 8.5%). Join related ideas: ', and' / ', but' / ', yet'. Adjacent short sentences often want combining. | SHORT SENTENCES: 63.4% (ceiling: 62.0%, human: 52.2%). Too choppy. Combine adjacent short sentences using the constructions above.
